description: Statistical tests as reported in the paper appendix 'Statistical Tests'. DeLong tests compare full-set Task-1 AUROC pairwise; bootstrap CIs are 95% intervals over 1,000 resamples of the 72-hour Task-2 window.
key_findings: TrustGuard and DexRay are statistically indistinguishable on full-set AUROC (p = 0.757); MaskDroid's marginal AUROC lead is likewise not significant (p ~ 0.68).
Non-overlapping AIPR intervals support the multi-agent enforcement gain over the single-agent constrained baseline.
